title: NextRole – multi-agent resume tailoring and interview prep
abstract: Tired of stressing over your resume? Introducing NextRole – your personal career advisor that tailors your resume and interview preparation automatically. It's like magic – every application you submit will be unique. Give it a try, and who knows, the next job offer might just be waiting for you in NextRole!
abstract_zh: 你还在为简历改来改去愁眉不展？NextRole来了！它就像是你的私人职业顾问，根据你的经历自动调整简历和面试技巧。就像变魔术一样，让你的每一份申请都变得独一无二。赶紧试试吧，说不定下一个Offer就等你在NextRole里！
